originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'val' is never read

presenceCondition:
(or (and ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)
    (and ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)))
model:
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: b62bd7b261b.c L16: val dead store. 'val = (s && s[1]) ? s+1 : NULL' at L16 — val's new value is never subsequently read. Inside #ifdef MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP, 's = a' (not val) is used; outside REGEXP, val is unused after L16. PC: MDEV_CONF AND MDEV_RENAME (MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP cancels — both T and F branches present), correctly capturing the scope where L16 exists. No restrictive library macros. New bug, correctly constrained PC. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_155 (TRUE_NEW).
